problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
hypothesis: If BDNF upregulation to promote neurogenesis is applied to reversed, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 28 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
